# Research Patra
> Ethical academic research writing, analysis, and manuscript formatting support.

## What we do
- Thesis and dissertation chapter writing
- Research proposals and synopses
- Research papers and systematic literature reviews
- Statistical and bibliometric analysis (SPSS, R, Python, VOSviewer)
- Patent documentation and prior art research support
- Manuscript formatting for Scopus, SCI, and UGC Care guidelines
- Editing and proofreading for academic manuscripts

## Pages
- / : Home
- /services : All services overview
- /about : About Research Patra
- /how-we-work : Engagement process and revision policy
- /research-areas : Disciplines and academic levels we support
- /ethical-approach : Academic integrity and ethics policy
- /privacy-policy : Privacy policy
- /terms-and-conditions : Terms and conditions
- /topic-selection : Research topic selection support
- /synopsis : Research proposal and synopsis writing
- /thesis-writing : Thesis and dissertation writing
- /research-papers : Research and review paper writing
- /systematic-review : Systematic literature review support
- /statistical-analysis : Statistical data analysis
- /bibliometric-analysis : Bibliometric and scientometric analysis
- /patent-support : Patent documentation and prior art support
- /editing-proofreading : Editing and proofreading
- /scopus-publication : Scopus manuscript formatting support
- /sci-journal-publication : SCI / WoS manuscript formatting support
- /ugc-publication : UGC Care and conference paper support
